scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w apps/demo
scripts.dev:openfin: concurrently -k -n vite,openfin -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/demo -- --open=false" "wait-on http://localhost:5190 && node openfin/launch.mjs http://localhost:5190/openfin/manifest.json"
scripts.start:openfin: concurrently -k -n serve,openfin -c cyan,magenta "npx -y serve -p 4173 -s apps/demo/dist" "wait-on http://localhost:4173 && node openfin/launch.mjs http://localhost:4173/openfin/manifest.prod.json"
